name: Mr.Egg:Adventure
short_description: This is a side-scrolling game with pixel art, the main character is Mr.EGG, you can brandish your sword and throw the egg shell to defeat the enemy on the way, you can also change your appearance with coins in the shop.
detailed_description: One day, a devil spread the virus, an egg embark on a adventure to save the world, so he defeated all the enemy and wipe out the root of all virus.《Mr.X:Adventure》is a side-scrolling, adventure and action game, it features 32 stages, including 8 bosses. This mini game is made by only one student,  hope that you will not stint your criticism.
about_the_game: One day, a devil spread the virus, an egg embark on a adventure to save the world, so he defeated all the enemy and wipe out the root of all virus.《Mr.X:Adventure》is a side-scrolling, adventure and action game, it features 32 stages, including 8 bosses. This mini game is made by only one student,  hope that you will not stint your criticism.
supported_languages: English, Traditional Chinese, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Bulgarian, Turkish, Norwegian, Japanese, Thai, Swedish, Finnish, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, French, German, Russian, Hungarian, Greek, Czech, Polish, Ukrainian, Simplified Chinese, Romanian, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Vietnamese, Korean
